rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Poland's security, energy, or economy; the US strike on Tren de Aragua is distant and the G7 protests are minor background noise. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: A US airstrike killed the Tren de Aragua leader; this is a distant US security action with no direct bearing on Polish daily life.

top_events.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
top_events.summary: Anti-G7 protests in Geneva are background noise for Poland; no policy change or security spillover affecting Polish residents.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km
top_events.summary: Israeli territorial expansion in the Middle East is a distant conflict with no direct impact on Polish security or economy this cycle.
